item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Compute Locations Location Communitygalleries Publicgalleryname Images Galleryimagename Versions Galleryimageversionname

variable.description: (Required) Subscription credentials which uniquely identify Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The public name of the community gallery.
(Required) The name of the community gallery image definition.

(Required) The name of the community gallery image version. Needs to follow semantic version name pattern: The allowed characters are digit and period. Digits must be within the range of a 32-bit integer. Format: <MajorVersion>.<MinorVersion>.<Patch>

request.description: Get a community gallery image version.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
